current_theorem_target: Resolved: the literal convergence-from-hypotheses formulation is false by a counterexample with quotient subsequential limits phi and phi+1/4.

banked: Counterpacket implies the residual Type I profile through the forward reduction.
Core-hole: z0+r is not in FS(C\S) for every nonzero r in FS(I).
V43 threshold monotonicity is suffix-scoped only.
Finite-deletion low-element capture lemma: a complete finite deletion localizes a representation below w whenever the target block contains every undeleted element at most w.
Global sparse-deletion dichotomy: tau_A(n) tending to infinity contradicts hypothesis 2.
Every hypothetical counterexample has bounded pairwise-disjoint moving global transversals after one finite normalization.
Price counterpacket: H1, H2, ratio gap 6/5, and two distinct quotient subsequential limits.
Global top-band cap: H3 gives uniformly bounded global transversal and matching numbers.
live: Optional fresh local Lean kernel replay once a trusted Lean toolchain is available.
Separate limit-exists interpretation only: audit or present the conditional phi theorem if requested.
cut: pGAP, NUGAP, VALGAP, and TAUGAP forcing.
Support deletion treated as one-element deletion.
Local Type I compatibility treated as an original counterpacket.
Mounted representation repair without a new defect-decreasing exchange law.
Global transversal or matching growth under H3; the canonical top-band cover is uniformly bounded.
hard_wall: None for the literal formulation; only optional operational kernel replay remains.

next_action: Stop the positive-proof loop for the literal statement. Preserve the counterpacket and optionally run a fresh local Lean kernel replay when a trusted toolchain is available.
